title: Claude Code Skill Creator 评测体系深度解析
brief: 技术分析文章封面，极简信息图风格。主体为两条并行流水线：左侧代表带技能的Agent执行流程，右侧代表不带技能的基线执行，中间汇聚到一个仪表盘面板显示评测指标（通过率、耗时、Token）。采用深蓝灰底色搭配点缀性的暗红色作为数据高亮点，留白干净，现代开发者工具审美。
prompt:
Create an illustration titled 'Claude Code Skill Creator 评测体系深度解析'. Style: contemporary editorial illustration, layered composition, subtle texture, restrained color palette, atmospheric but concrete, article-friendly visual metaphor, no text labels, no diagrams, no arrows. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a WeChat Official Account headline cover image (公众号头条封面). Compose for a 2.35:1 ultra-wide crop (1080x460). Keep key subjects centered or in the bottom third — top area will be cropped. Design for readability as a small thumbnail in WeChat's subscription feed. Title text will be overlaid by the editor, so leave ample negative space. Language/region: zh. Target aspect ratio: wechat-cover-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
技术分析文章封面，极简信息图风格。主体为两条并行流水线：左侧代表带技能的Agent执行流程，右侧代表不带技能的基线执行，中间汇聚到一个仪表盘面板显示评测指标（通过率、耗时、Token）。采用深蓝灰底色搭配点缀性的暗红色作为数据高亮点，留白干净，现代开发者工具审美。
